name: live-browser-debug
description: Debug the real browser session by temporarily wiring a local bridge client into a frontend app during development.

interface.shortDescription: Record and inspect the user's real browser session during local frontend debugging
interface.longDescription: Adds a local MCP bridge for real-browser frontend debugging. Codex can prepare a temporary injection patch, attach to live tabs, record incident timelines, inspect console logs, DOM snapshots, network activity, redirects, and approximate visual captures, then remove the temporary integration when debugging ends.
defaultPrompt: Prepare live browser debugging for this frontend app
Attach to the redirected tab and record the next 30 seconds
Show me the browser timeline around the redirect
Clean up the temporary debug integration when done
